description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a rectangular footprint and a flat, green roof. The front facade features a double garage, a main entryway with a small gate, and two prominent trees flanking the entrance. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, a round above-ground pool, and a swing set, all set on a manicured lawn. The house has numerous large windows arranged in horizontal rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or off-white color, and the structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco with glass windows. The layout suggests multiple rooms, including living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas, with a clear division between indoor and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed suburban house with a double garage, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and play area. The exterior is light-colored with prominent landscaping and multiple entry points.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with a gate, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, above-ground pool, and swing set on a green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large backyard, swimming pool, and extensive window arrangements along the back wall.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the swing set, above-ground pool, and a secondary entrance with a small paved area and tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small gate, steps, and flanked by two large trees; simple modern door with minimal decorative elements.
